name: Party Chicken Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Italian Salad Dressing Mix, dry
1 can Cream Of Mushroom Soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Reserve half a teaspoon of the salad dressing mix.
2. In a large skillet, combine butter and the reserved salad dressing mix. Cook until melted.
3. Add chicken and brown slowly until golden.
4. Place the chicken in a 9 x 13-inch baking dish.
5. In another bowl, blend together the cream of mushroom soup, softened cream cheese, chopped chives, and Sauterne wine.
6. Spoon the mixture over the chicken.
7. Bake uncovered at 325°F for 1 hour. Baste occasionally with the sauce.
8. Serve over cooked rice to which the reserved half teaspoon salad dressing mix has been added.
Serves 6
